sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 119:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 119:1
items.html: The light of the Dalet [ד] that surrounds the truncated Vav [ו] inside the Hey [ה], which reached the Yesod from the coupling of ZON of Bina, which is the phase of GAR without VAK, meaning without light of Hassadim, descended from Yesod and clothed in Malchut. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
